query_title: Nothing Left to Do But Cry

recommendations.title: I'm Starting from Three
recommendations.overview: Gaetano, a young Neapolitan, decides to leave home, work and friends, to look for other moments of life and meet other people.

recommendations.title: Le vie del Signore sono finite
recommendations.overview: Set in Italy during the 1920s, a barber is in a wheelchair because of a psychosomatic illness after he lost the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: I Thought It Was Love
recommendations.overview: Tommaso goes incredible lengths to win back the love of his former girlfriend Cecilia, but sometimes things change in the most unexpected way.

recommendations.title: Life Is Beautiful

recommendations.title: Sorry for the Delay
recommendations.overview: Vincenzo, a 30 years old apathetic and lazy man who still lives with his mother, has no job and no desire to improve. He meets Anna and fell in love with her but to keep the relationship alive he has to learn to accept more responsibility.

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: Roberto Benigni adapts the classic children's tale by Carlo Collodi for the big-budget family-oriented comedy Pinocchio.

recommendations.title: The Little Devil
recommendations.overview: Father Maurice, a priest living in a residential college for priests in Rome, is called out one day to "exorcise" the devil from someone. The devil turns out to be in the form of a fun-loving man called Giuditta. What Father Maurice doesn't know is t

recommendations.title: What Time Is It?
recommendations.overview: A father and his son who lived seperated for some time meet each other one day and try to talk their problems over and understand their diametrical differences.
